---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What's the problem?**
What are you trying to do that LLM-wiki doesn't support well?

**What would help?**
Describe the feature or change you'd like.

**Which part of LLM-wiki does this affect?**
- [ ] Bootstrap script
- [ ] Validation scripts (wiki_check, raw_manifest_check, etc.)
- [ ] Platform templates (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursorrules, etc.)
- [ ] Documentation (UNIVERSAL.md, playbook, README)
- [ ] Other: ___
